name: PCD 8544 Display (Nokia 5110/3310)
description: The `pcd8544` display platform allows you to use PCD8544 ([Adafruit](https://www.adafruit.com/product/338)) displays with ESPHome. Connection to this display is made using the 4-Wire [SPI bus](https://esphome.io/components/spi).

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: The interval to re-draw the screen. Defaults to `5s`.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Lambda
config_entries.description:
**Set at most one of:** `pages`, `lambda`.

The lambda to use for rendering the content on the display. See [Display Rendering Engine](https://esphome.io/components/display#display-engine) for more information.

config_entries.label: Pages
config_entries.description:
**Set at most one of:** `pages`, `lambda`.

Show pages instead of a single lambda. See [Display Pages](https://esphome.io/components/display#display-pages).

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: Auto Clear Enabled
config_entries.description: Whether to automatically clear the display data before each lambda call, or to keep the existing display content (must overwrite explicitly, e.g., only on data change). Defaults to `true` if a lambda or pages are configured, false otherwise.

config_entries.label: Rotation
config_entries.description: Set the rotation of the display. Everything you draw in `lambda:` will be rotated by this option. One of `0°` (default), `90°`, `180°`, `270°`.
